meta.title: Dalia's Corner — A Little Corner of Love
meta.description: Handmade, hand-painted pottery planters shaped like cute animal characters. Born from clay and painted by family hands in Egypt. Meet Bahira, Shokat & Shokareya.

hero.subheadline: Not just planters… they're *characters* with stories, born from clay and painted by family hands.
hero.supporting: Choose the character that will live in your corner and keep your plants company.

about.title: Our *Story*
about.body: It all started with Mama Dalia's love for plants and for working with her hands. From that love, Dalia's Corner was born: a family project we work on together — my mother, my sisters, and I. We shape clay by hand into pottery characters with soul and story, painting each piece one by one — so every single one comes out unique, with no other like it in the world.

characters.title: Meet the *Characters*
characters.intro: Meet the family — each character has its own mood and story. Pick the one that feels like you.

why.title: Why *Dalia's Corner*?
points: Every pottery piece is fully handmade and hand-painted by the family
A unique character, no two ever alike
Arrives already planted with an easy-care succulent — plus a care card
Packed with love and care to reach you safely

order.title: How to *Order*
order.primaryBody: Add the characters you love to your cart, then checkout — we'll pick it up on WhatsApp with your list ready.
order.altBody: Screenshot the one you want and send it to us on Instagram or WhatsApp. We'll sort out the details and deliver it to your doorstep anywhere in Cairo.

items.a: Right now we deliver within Cairo only. Cost and timing depend on your area, and we'll share the details when confirming your order.
No, each one is hand-painted, so you might find small differences — and that's exactly what makes every piece unique.

items.q: Can I request a character in a specific color or design?
items.a: Message us on Instagram or WhatsApp and let's see what we can do together.

items.q: Do the plants come with the planters?
items.a: Yes! Each planter arrives already planted with an easy-care succulent and a little care card — they're hardy and simple to look after.

footer.madeWith: Dalia's Corner — Made with love in Egypt

cart.title: Your cart
cart.empty: Your corner is empty — go meet the family.
cart.copiedForInstagram: Order details copied — paste them into your Instagram chat with us.
cart.requestNote: No prices here — it's a wishlist. We'll settle the details and shipping together on WhatsApp.

whatsapp.greeting: Hi Dalia's Corner! 🌿 I'd like to order:
whatsapp.closing: Could you help me with the details and shipping?
